info.name: Avalara 1099 & W-9 API
info.description:
The Avalara 1099 and W-9 API automates collection, validation, and e-filing of IRS forms including 1099 variants (1099-NEC, 1099-MISC, 1099-K, 1099-INT, 1099-DIV), 1095 forms, W-2, and 1042-S. It provides endpoints for creating, updating, managing, and filing various IRS information returns.

Contact Support:
 Name: Avalara Developer Relations
 Email: developer.relations@avalara.com

item.name: Avalara Create a W-9 Collection Request

request.description: Sends a W-9 collection request to a payee, allowing them to submit their taxpayer information electronically.
